texto: Maybe dream chasing is like climbing a mountain. You know, finding the trail, stepping onto it. At first you're energetic and it's easy. Then you trip over a root, face a huge boulder, or a steep incline. So you stand up after the fall, find your way around the boulder, and trudge up the vertical. Eventually, you're on top of the mountain with an expansive view of the world." ~ Michael Stlis in "A Stop in the Park
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Peggy Morehouse Strack: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “Maybe dream chasing is like climbing a mountain. You know, finding the trail, stepping onto it. A…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, discover, dream pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e dream.
